Nº 03 — Side Events

Before and after the main day.

Wed · Jan 27
7:00 PM

Welcome Dinner

AtPrime 54

The night before, at Fontainebleau's signature steakhouse. Speakers, partners, and a small group of attendees gather over a long table for the first conversations of the week.

Price TBD
Thu · Jan 28
7:00 PM

After Party & Dinner

AtHakkasan

Drinks, dinner, and unhurried conversation at Michelin-recognized Cantonese on Fontainebleau's fourth floor. The day doesn't end at 5 — the most useful conversations rarely happen in the room.

Price TBD
Fri · Jan 29
10:00 AM

Builder Brunch

AtLa Côte

A smaller, more technical morning at Fontainebleau's beachside French Mediterranean. Working sessions, informal talks, ocean views, and strong coffee. Bring something you're stuck on.

Price TBD
Fri · Jan 29
2:00 PM

Miami Walking Tour

Meet atFontainebleau Lobby

A guided afternoon walk through Miami with a local historian. Art, architecture, and a little city history. Hotel guests are picked up at the lobby; everyone else meets there at the start time.

Price TBD

Nº 05 — Venue

Fontainebleau. Miami Beach.

The venue, confirmed

The most iconic hotel in Miami Beach.

Twenty oceanfront acres on Collins Avenue. Designed by Morris Lapidus in 1954, named to the National Register of Historic Places, and a fixture of American glamour ever since — from Goldfinger to Sinatra at La Ronde to a billion-dollar renovation that preserved every curve.

The summit takes over the Coastal Convention Center: forty-five thousand square feet of dedicated space, a private rooftop terrace, and ocean views from every angle. The entire week of side events runs on-property — Prime 54, Hakkasan, La Côte — without ever leaving the resort.

A summit-rate room block runs through January 28. Travel guidance below.

Address
4441 Collins Avenue
Miami Beach, FL 33140
Getting there
~25 min from MIA
~45 min from FLL
Lodging
Fontainebleau Miami Beach
On-property
Lapis Spa · LIV
Beach & pools
Nº 06 — FAQ

Asked and answered.

01Is this for me?

Likely, if you've spent serious time around bitcoin in some capacity — builder, allocator, founder, business owner, writer, operator — or if you're a thoughtful newcomer who wants to go deeper. The room is built for substance, not status. If you're on the fence, come.

02What's included with my ticket?

Every ticket includes the full program, food and drink across the day, all sessions, and access to the recordings. The tiers differ in price, not in what you receive.

You should not have to upgrade to get lunch. We feel strongly about that.

03Can I buy a ticket with bitcoin?

Of course. Checkout supports on-chain, Lightning, and card. Lightning is the fastest and our preferred method. You'll get the same ticket either way.

04What's the refund policy?

Full refund through November 28, 2026. After that, tickets are transferable — name a replacement up to 48 hours before the event.

05Are talks recorded?

Yes. All keynotes and talks are recorded and published to ticketholders within two weeks. Panel and fireside recordings are released with speaker approval. Q&A sessions are intentionally off the record.

06Group rates and company passes?

Group rates available — four seats together at a discount, six or more by direct arrangement. Write to us.

07How is this different from the other Miami bitcoin events?

The big ones are excellent at being big. We do the opposite — one day, one stage, three hundred seats, fourteen speakers chosen with intent. If the trade-show model is the festival, this is the dinner party.

08Accessibility, dietary, and other accommodations?

The venue will be fully accessible — that's a hard requirement when we choose. Lunch is plated, with vegetarian, kosher, halal, and gluten-free options noted in your ticket form. If there's something we haven't thought of, ask — it's one day in one building, we can usually accommodate.
